title: Add chrono dep to jmap-chat Cargo.toml
description:
What: Add chrono as a dependency of the jmap-chat library crate.

Algorithm:
1. Open /home/mark/PROJECT/jmap-chat-ui/crates/jmap-chat/Cargo.toml
2. Under [dependencies], add: chrono = { workspace = true }
3. Confirm /home/mark/PROJECT/jmap-chat-ui/Cargo.toml already has chrono with features=["serde"] -- it does.
4. Run: cargo check -p jmap-chat to verify it compiles.
5. Run: cargo test -p jmap-chat to confirm no regressions.

Defensive rules:
- Do not change any .rs files.
- Do not add any other deps.

Tests: cargo check -p jmap-chat exits 0. No new code changes.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p jmap-chat succeeds. cargo test -p jmap-chat passes (no regressions). Cargo.lock updated to include chrono in jmap-chat.
